candidate_checks: build and inspect the package artifact
common_failure_modes: package builds locally but not from clean metadata
supported import surface regresses without a test
profiles.cost_noise: Prefer one supported Python version unless compatibility evidence justifies a matrix.
structural_invariants: package metadata, import surface, and built artifact must remain mutually compatible

candidate_checks: invoke help and one negative CLI case
common_failure_modes: entry point points to a missing callable
invalid CLI input exits without a stable diagnostic
profiles.cost_noise: Keep smoke tests process-local and deterministic.
structural_invariants: declared console entry points must resolve and provide actionable failures

candidate_checks: import application and exercise representative request contracts
common_failure_modes: request validation or response contract drifts
profiles.cost_noise: Avoid live external services in the baseline suite.
structural_invariants: route schemas and handler behavior must remain aligned

candidate_checks: run Django checks and migration consistency tests
common_failure_modes: settings import or system check failure
structural_invariants: models, migrations, settings, and checks must remain compatible

profiles.cost_noise: Use bounded fixtures rather than production datasets.
structural_invariants: input schemas, transformation stages, and output schemas must remain compatible

candidate_checks: test task registration and malformed payloads without a live broker
common_failure_modes: payload shape is rejected only at runtime
profiles.cost_noise: Do not require external brokers for baseline validation.
structural_invariants: task registration, serialization, and retry behavior must remain deterministic

profiles.cost_noise: Avoid flaky pixel-level UI automation as a default.
structural_invariants: application entry point and packaged resources must remain loadable

candidate_checks: run a tiny deterministic inference fixture
common_failure_modes: model artifact is unavailable or incompatible
profiles.cost_noise: Avoid downloading large models in ordinary pull-request validation.
structural_invariants: model input/output contract and preprocessing assumptions must remain versioned

candidate_checks: frozen install, tests, and package build
common_failure_modes: export map points to a missing file
profiles.cost_noise: Prefer the repository's existing package manager.
structural_invariants: package exports, types, and built files must remain aligned

candidate_checks: startup/import smoke test and route contract fixtures
common_failure_modes: service cannot start from a clean install
profiles.cost_noise: Avoid binding public ports or external services in baseline CI.
structural_invariants: service startup, route registration, and request contracts must remain compatible

common_failure_modes: production build fails despite unit tests
profiles.cost_noise: Do not add browser matrices without compatibility evidence.
structural_invariants: source, bundler configuration, and production build output must remain compatible

candidate_checks: validate manifest and inspect produced archive
profiles.cost_noise: Use browser execution only for behavior not covered by deterministic artifact checks.
structural_invariants: manifest, permissions, packaged files, and browser build variants must remain aligned

candidate_checks: component-aware command map and targeted validation
common_failure_modes: root workflow validates only one component
profiles.cost_noise: Avoid a blanket matrix when component boundaries are not proven.
structural_invariants: each component must map to its own commands, dependencies, and tests

candidate_checks: validate positive and malformed fixtures against closed schemas
profiles.cost_noise: Stable diagnostics are part of the contract where asserted.
structural_invariants: schemas, examples, validators, and producers must remain mutually compatible

candidate_checks: bounded link and claim consistency validation when evidence justifies it
common_failure_modes: documentation claims enforcement that does not exist
profiles.cost_noise: Do not add generic prose style gates.
structural_invariants: links, generated indexes, and normative references must remain internally consistent

candidate_checks: versioned contract fixtures and explicit unavailable-evidence handling
common_failure_modes: upstream shape changes without local detection
profiles.cost_noise: Do not call live upstream systems in ordinary deterministic tests.
structural_invariants: adapter input/output contracts must remain compatible with versioned external boundaries
